name: The Skinnerkin
inspire: If you have 3 or more haunch tokens, Inspire each friendly fighter.

reactions.name: Grasping Talons
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after a friendly Carnskyr Moves.
reactions.rulesText: Pick an enemy fighter in a hex that the Carnskyr moved through and roll an Attack dice. On a {icon:dodge} or {icon:fury}, inflict 1 damage on that fighter and gain a haunch token. Otherwise, you can push that fighter up to 1 hex.

reactions.name: Taste Test
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after you resolve a Core ability for a friendly fighter.
reactions.flavorText: To earn the nod of approval from Gristla Tenderhooke is the dream of all ghoul butchers.
reactions.rulesText: Discard a haunch token and then Inspire a friendly fighter.

reactions.name: This One is Ruined; Fetch Me Another!
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after making an Attack roll for a friendly fighter.
reactions.flavorText: Madam Tenderhooke is a discerning culinary artist; she will only accept the very best for her beloved king's tables.
reactions.rulesText: Discard a haunch token and then re-roll 1 Attack dice in that Attack roll.

reactions.name: The King Hungers!
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after you pick a melee weapon as part of an Attack.
reactions.flavorText: Sometimes, fine filleting cuts are required from a chef. And sometimes, a less… subtle approach is needed.
reactions.rulesText: Discard a haunch token. That weapon has Grievous ({icon:grievous}) for that Attack.

reactions.name: Quick Nibble
reactions.trigger: Use this in your opponent's Power step.
reactions.flavorText: Well, you can hardly serve royalty something you wouldn't eat yourself, can you?
reactions.rulesText: Discard a haunch token and pick a friendly fighter. Heal that fighter.

abilities.name: Prime Cuts
abilities.rulesText:
Immediately after a Flanked or Surrounded enemy fighter is slain, gain a haunch token.

Immediately after a friendly chef's ({icon:skull}) successful Attack, gain a haunch token.

If a friendly fighter's weapon has the {icon:cleave} runemark, you have access to the following Weapon ability:

Fillet {icon:cleave}: If the Attack was successful, gain a haunch token.
